verse_text: For if an enemy reviled me, I would have endured it; And if one hating me boasted against me, I would have hidden from him.

links.context: Christ emphasizes both that His betrayer is one of the twelve and that he is one who dips with Me in the dish not so much to identify the person as to emphasize the level of betrayal, that this was one of His closest friends (see [[PSA.54:13]]-15).

symbolic.title: Returning to the Garden of Eden
